definition.featurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="feature_container" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><value name="feature"><block type="feature_simple_block"><field name="schedule_tick">TRUE</field><value name="block"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="block">CUSTOM:Tripmine</field></block></value></block></value><next><block type="placement_rarity"><field name="rarity">5</field><next><block type="placement_in_square"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This moves the feature so that it doesn't generate in the corner only</comment><next><block type="placement_heightmap"><field name="heightmap">OCEAN_FLOOR_WG</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">We try to generate the feature on the ocean floor</comment><next><block type="placement_block_predicate_filter"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">We try to generate the feature only in water</comment><value name="condition"><block type="block_predicate_not"><value name="condition"><block type="block_predicate_solid"><field name="x">0</field><field name="y">1</field><field name="z">0</field></block></value></block></value><next><block type="placement_offset"><value name="xz"><block type="int_provider_constant"><field name="value">0</field></block></value><value name="y"><block type="int_provider_constant"><field name="value">-1</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
